study.claim: With a real arena, wall-aware rewards, and stronger predator learning, do we get collective structure that improves survival without the runaway escape exploit?
study.description: Week-2 benchmark with hard cube boundaries, density-only PBRS, wall penalties, and shared predator catch reward.
study.name: Hard-wall predator-prey benchmark
study.notes: This study intentionally preserves the old v1 file for reproducibility and moves new training onto a fresh config.
